invariants.description: feedback_graph.json must be valid JSON
adaptive-state.json must be valid JSON
Evolution journal must exist for calibration anchors
Must have at least 5 run-history snapshots
trace.jsonl and latest run-history snapshot must be from the same pipeline run (within 5 minutes)
invariants.context: Run-history and trace snapshots must be freshness-aligned. Repair regenerates trace-summary and a current run snapshot from METRICS_DIR.

invariants.description: current-run.json unified pointer must be valid JSON
feedback_graph.json must have at least 11 feedback loops
Meta-coherence audit script (the detector-of-detectors) must exist so the HME diagnostic layer is continuously self-validated
Phase 3 (policy engine)  check-hme-coherence.js must exist as the pipeline gate reading hme-activity.jsonl
main-pipeline.js PRE_COMPOSITION must include check-hme-coherence so violations block composition
Phase 2.3  round coherence score computer must exist
compute-coherence-score.js must include an exploration_bonus term from productive_incoherence events
Phase 3.4  prediction reconciler must exist
cascade_analysis must log every prediction so the reconciler can score accuracy

hme_coherence must show non-degenerate variance across rounds. If it stays at a single value (usually 0) for many rounds, the read_coverage -> coherence -> musical_correlation -> kb_trust cascade is silently broken.
invariants.context: hme_coherence must show non-degenerate variance across rounds. If it stays at a single value (usually 0) for many rounds, the read_coverage -> coherence -> musical_correlation -> kb_trust cascade is silently broken. This invariant caught a months-long regression where the activity_log middleware emitted file_written events without the hme_read_prior field. min_distinct=3 because 0/1 outliers can occur even when upstream is broken -- we need real motion to declare the cascade healthy.

invariants.description: EnCodec perceptual_complexity_avg must vary across rounds. If this is flat, the compositional output is genuinely identical every round OR the EnCodec pipeline is producing cached/stale signals.
invariants.context: EnCodec perceptual_complexity_avg must vary across rounds. If this is flat, the compositional output is genuinely identical every round OR the EnCodec pipeline is producing cached/stale signals. Either case means the external anchor's most-sensitive dimension is dead.

invariants.description: CLAP tension query peak must vary across rounds.
invariants.context: CLAP tension query peak must vary across rounds. Flat CLAP means the CLAP model isn't sensitive to the compositional motion the pipeline produces -- either broken inference or the compositions are all semantically identical to CLAP.

invariants.description: hme_prediction_accuracy must show non-degenerate variance across rounds. Constant-zero accuracy means the cascade model predicts identically every time (dependency graph drifted, or reconciler never confirms).
Every pipeline_start must be followed by exactly one pipeline_run in the recent activity window.
invariants.context: Every pipeline_start must be followed by exactly one pipeline_run in the recent activity window. Catches observability regressions where a refactor drops emission of one of the paired events -- the pipeline owns its own instrumentation, and a missing emission silently breaks every downstream slicer.

invariants.description: Every pipeline_run must be paired with a round_complete event in the recent window.
invariants.context: Every pipeline_run must be paired with a round_complete event in the recent window. R23: window narrowed from 500 to 100 to self-heal faster -- a persistent historical imbalance (pre-R17 duplicate emissions) otherwise pins the invariant to old state. At 100 events (~3-4 pipeline pairs), only recent behavior matters.

invariants.description: file_written events must carry module names that look like real source file basenames -- alphanumeric with underscore/dash/dot, 1-64 chars; numeric middleware prefixes are valid.
invariants.context: file_written events must carry module names that look like real source file basenames -- alphanumeric with underscore/dash/dot, 1-64 chars; numeric middleware prefixes are valid. Catches infrastructure leaks: LanceDB UUIDs, timestamps, hex strings that indicate the watcher filter is letting noise through.

invariants.description: Rounds with identical git SHA must produce hme_coherence values within 0.02 of each other.
invariants.context: Rounds with identical git SHA must produce hme_coherence values within 0.02 of each other. If the metric varies across identical-code runs, either a verifier has random inputs, a cache leaks state between runs, or something time-dependent is infecting the score.

invariants.description: predictions_log_size minus predictions_total measures how many stale predictions linger from previous rounds.
invariants.context: predictions_log_size minus predictions_total measures how many stale predictions linger from previous rounds. Flagged only when gap GROWS round-over-round -- transient high gaps from accumulated history (before truncation catches up) are normal. Arc IV retirement candidate if this keeps flapping; otherwise converges after 2-3 rounds of the 50-line cap taking effect.

invariants.description: Every retirement in metrics/legacy-override-retirement-log.jsonl must NOT appear as a current LEGACY_OVERRIDES entry in check-hypermeta-jurisdiction.js.
invariants.born_from: legacy override retirement log consistency guard
invariants.context: Every retirement in metrics/legacy-override-retirement-log.jsonl must NOT appear as a current LEGACY_OVERRIDES entry in check-hypermeta-jurisdiction.js. And every LEGACY_OVERRIDES entry that's been removed (absent from source detection) must have a retirement log entry. Catches silent removals that bypass the measurement-driven retirement pattern.

invariants.description: Once the predictor has processed 3+ rounds with >=1 shifted module each, recall should be >= 0.5 (predicted modules catch at least half of actual shifts).
invariants.context: Once the predictor has processed 3+ rounds with >=1 shifted module each, recall should be >= 0.5 (predicted modules catch at least half of actual shifts). Low recall means the cascade model isn't seeing the dependency structure; low precision is acceptable (overprediction tolerable) but low recall is a structural blind spot.

invariants.description: Any legacy override with 0 fires AND 0 entries across the last 5 pipeline runs is a data-proven removal candidate.
invariants.born_from: R11-R15 measurement-driven legacy override retirement pattern
invariants.context: Any legacy override with 0 fires AND 0 entries across the last 5 pipeline runs is a data-proven removal candidate. Fires at error severity after 5 zero rounds -- by that point the signal is strong enough to demand action, not just warn. Escalation path: instrument (R11) -> warn (3 rounds) -> error (5 rounds). Retired ids (those in legacy-override-retirement-log.jsonl) are excluded so historical zero rows don't flag already-removed overrides. entropy-cap-0.19 (R13) and phase-trust-seesaw (R15) were the first retirements via this pattern.

invariants.description: Every LEGACY_OVERRIDES entry in check-hypermeta-jurisdiction.js must match at least one call site in SpecialCaps source.
invariants.context: Every LEGACY_OVERRIDES entry in check-hypermeta-jurisdiction.js must match at least one call site in SpecialCaps source. An id with zero matches means its detector regex drifted (variable renamed, refactored out, etc.) -- silently disarming the jurisdiction gate. registeredByLegacyId must have a positive count for every allowlisted id.

invariants.description: Meta-invariant: another invariant must not have been FAILing for >=10 consecutive runs. Catches the meta-pattern where alarms become background noise and never get addressed.
The ultimate anti-drift check: hme_coherence must be at least WEAKLY positively correlated with the musical verdict, not flat and not inverse.
invariants.name: hme_coherence__verdict_numeric
invariants.context: The ultimate anti-drift check: hme_coherence must be at least WEAKLY positively correlated with the musical verdict, not flat and not inverse. A strongly negative correlation means HME's process discipline is actively hurting the music -- the whole optimization direction is wrong. This invariant is INERT when the correlation is degenerate (that's covered by coherence-has-variance); it only fires once there's enough signal to judge direction.

invariants.description: R22 #5: envelope-shift is the center-of-mass movement of the legendary state distribution across first-half vs second-half of accumulated snapshots.
invariants.context: R22 #5: envelope-shift is the center-of-mass movement of the legendary state distribution across first-half vs second-half of accumulated snapshots. average_relative_shift > 0.5 means the 'normal' state itself is drifting fast -- distinct from single-round drift (which Arc III's legendary-drift-bounded catches). Large envelope shift = regime change, not anomaly.

invariants.description: Arc III: current round's HME state must stay within 2sigma envelope of prior legendary rounds (mean |z-score| across numeric state fields < 2.0).
invariants.context: Arc III: current round's HME state must stay within 2sigma envelope of prior legendary rounds (mean |z-score| across numeric state fields < 2.0). Preemptive detection: fires BEFORE the listening verdict fails, catching drift toward non-legendary territory. Reads metrics/hme-legendary-drift.json. Inert until envelope is computable (5+ snapshots).

invariants.description: Arc II: every matched pattern in metrics/hme-pattern-matches.json must carry non-empty action_summary + action_steps.
invariants.context: Arc II: every matched pattern in metrics/hme-pattern-matches.json must carry non-empty action_summary + action_steps. A pattern that triggers without defining what to do is decorative -- it flags a condition but gives the agent no script to run. The registry's value is action-grounding, not just condition-detection.

invariants.description: Arc IV meta-measurement: more than 3 invariants in 'flappy' class (firing without citation in any commit message) means the battery has accumulated noise that clutters fail-reporting without driving action.
invariants.context: Arc IV meta-measurement: more than 3 invariants in 'flappy' class (firing without citation in any commit message) means the battery has accumulated noise that clutters fail-reporting without driving action. Either fix the underlying bug OR recalibrate the flappy invariants OR retire them via the same data-driven pattern used for legacy overrides. Reads metrics/hme-invariant-efficacy.json.

invariants.description: Arc I: cross-substrate consensus. Fires when divergence='high' (stdev > 0.4).
invariants.context: Arc I: cross-substrate consensus. Fires when divergence='high' (stdev > 0.4). R24 #5: suppresses the warning when the same outlier voter has persisted for 3+ consecutive rounds AND listening verdict remains legendary -- a stable dissent is an accepted regime state, not a regression. New divergences and voter changes still fire.

invariants.description: Fallback anchor for coherence-tracks-musical-outcome. verdict_numeric collapses to 1.0 for every STABLE run (most rounds), making its correlation permanently degenerate.
invariants.name: hme_coherence__hci_normalized
invariants.context: Fallback anchor for coherence-tracks-musical-outcome. verdict_numeric collapses to 1.0 for every STABLE run (most rounds), making its correlation permanently degenerate. hci has real variance (94.7->96.5 across recent rounds); hme_coherence correlated with hci_normalized is the working alternative. Inert until both metrics have 3+ distinct values.

invariants.description: Every round snapshot must have a round_id so downstream analyzers (intention-gap, reflexivity, trajectory) can cross-reference. Anonymous rounds collapse into unordered history.
invariants.context: Every round snapshot must have a round_id so downstream analyzers (intention-gap, reflexivity, trajectory) can cross-reference. Anonymous rounds collapse into unordered history. allow_null=false because null means 'no identity at all' here, not 'cold start' -- identity should be present on every single round.

invariants.description: Phase 5.2  coherence budget script must exist (homeostatic governance vs. maximization)
No new JS, Python, or shell hardcoded metrics path may appear; legacy findings are migration-baselined and new callers must use METRICS_DIR.
invariants.born_from: 2026 metrics path centralization: output/metrics is the only metrics directory
invariants.context: No new JS, Python, or shell hardcoded metrics path may appear; legacy findings are migration-baselined in tools/HME/config/invariants/hardcoded_metrics_baseline.json and new callers must use METRICS_DIR. Bare output/metrics in path.join(), os.path.join(), or shell strings is the violation class that caused metrics path fragmentation. Exempt: this invariant's own shell, migration script, comments in .md files.

invariants.description: Migration baselines must only shrink and must not hide new hardcoded metrics path findings.
invariants.born_from: 2026 hardcoded metrics path migration baseline must not become permanent cover
invariants.context: The no-hardcoded-metrics-path baseline is temporary migration state. New findings fail the source invariant; stale hashes or growth fail this guard so the baseline keeps shrinking.

invariants.description: log/ and tmp/ exist ONLY at the project root; metrics/ exists ONLY at output/metrics/. Any other instance of these directory names is a duplicate that fragments telemetry.
invariants.context: log/ and tmp/ exist ONLY at the project root; metrics/ exists ONLY at output/metrics/. Any other instance of these directory names is a duplicate that fragments telemetry. Writers must use $PROJECT_ROOT from .env; relative paths resolved against $(pwd) are banned in hook/daemon contexts.

invariants.description: tools/HME/config/invariants.json and metrics/hme-suspected-upstreams.json both parse and the suspected-upstreams registry has the required three buckets (candidates/confirmed/refuted).
